channel.title: Woodmont Industrial News Feed
channel.description: Daily industrial and CRE updates across key regions

item.title: Amazon shuts NJ warehouse because of coronavirus cases
item.description: If your kidney numbers are decreasing, read this short article now before doing anything else

item.title: Mapletree plans two-building, 953,000-square-foot logistics park after securing Manalapan site
item.description: Mapletree Investments has acquired some 97 acres in Monmouth County with plans to develop nearly 953,000 square feet of new industrial space across two buildings.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: Joshua Burd

item.title: Watch: Leaning Into Warehouse Automation
item.description: The warehouse model is under intense pressure, and operations need to fundamentally change, says Sarah Hollinger, vice president software implementation with Hy-Tek Intralogistics.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News

item.title: Industrial Demand Reorients as Tenants Pivot to Modern Space
item.description: Leasing momentum is recovering, while a tenant flight to newer facilities is reshaping vacancy dynamics.

item.author: GlobeSt

item.title: Fed Pauses Interest Rates Again as Commercial Real Estate Awaits New FOMC Chair
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell’s last scheduled meeting leading the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) ended with a third straight interest rate hold and signs of growing dissent among the board. The widely anticipated move two weeks before Powell’s second term as chair ends May 15 and two months after the onset of war in […]
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: Andrew Coen

item.title: Fashion Designer Pamella Roland Takes 10K-SF Office at 462 Seventh Avenue
item.description: A renowned Hollywood fashion designer is moving her workspace within Midtown South. Pamella Roland, known for designing evening gowns and cocktail dresses for A-list celebrities, has signed a five-year lease for 10,013 square feet at 462 Seventh Avenue, according to tenant broker Resolution Real Estate. Asking rent was $45 per square foot. Roland will relocate […]
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: Isabelle Durso

item.title: Bain Capital Buys South Florida Industrial Campus for $52M
item.description: Kurv Industrial, formerly called Bridge Industrial, has sold a warehouse campus in Pompano Beach, Fla., for $52 million, property records show. Bain Capital Real Estate purchased the 17-acre asset, called Bridge Point Pompano Beach Commerce Park. The property includes three warehouses totaling 380,496 square feet. All were built in the 1980s and 1990s. The campus, […]
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: Julia Echikson

item.title: KKR Mortgage REIT Slashes Dividend, Accelerates Troubled Loan Resolution
item.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust reported a first-quarter loss Thursday, and CEO Matt Salem declared that "2026 is a transition year for KREF" as it adjusts to shifting demand in the life sciences and office sectors.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: matthew.wasielewski@bisnow.com

item.title: P&C broker NFP acquires The Hamilton Group in Cedar Knolls
item.description: NFP, an Aon company and leading property and casualty (P&C) broker and benefits consultant, announced the acquisition of The Hamilton Group, LLC, a multidisciplinary insurance broker based in Cedar Knolls. The Hamilton Group’s Greg Frankel and David Page will join NFP as senior vice presidents reporting to Lauren Kim, regional managing director of P&C in […] The post P&C broker NFP acquires The Hamilton Group in Cedar Knolls appeared first on ROI-NJ.

item.title: NAI James E. Hanson negotiates $37M sale of IOS property in South Plainfield
item.description: NAI James E. Hanson, the largest New Jersey-based full-service independent commercial real estate firm, arranged the $37 million sale of a 7.81-acre industrial outdoor storage (IOS) site with two buildings totaling 30,069 square feet, located at 200 St. Nicholas Avenue in South Plainfield. Senior Managing Directors Jordan Avanzato, SIOR, and Christopher D. Todd, SIOR, and […] The post NAI James E. Hanson negotiates $37M sale of IOS property in South Plainfield appeared first on ROI-NJ.
item.category: Transactions — Property Sales & Leases
item.author: ROI-NJ Staff

item.title: Colliers: Iran War To Increase Real Estate Capital Costs, Drive Warehouse Demand
item.description: Days into a tenuous ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, the impacts of the war for commercial real estate are becoming clearer.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: ciara.long@bisnow.com

item.title: JLL report said leasing for Class A industrial segment surged in first quarter
item.description: JLL’s first quarter 2026 New Jersey industrial report shows a surge in leasing activity as high-credit, name-brand tenants return to the market. However, the industrial market shows a bifurcation in leasing activity. As Class A vacancy tightens and rents hold firm, lower-tier assets are losing occupancy and pricing power, widening the performance gap across asset […] The post JLL report said leasing for Class A industrial segment surged in first quarter appeared first on ROI-NJ.
item.category: Relevant — Market Trends & Real Estate News
item.author: John Harrington
